findings.description: `GlobalErrorHandler` is a PascalCase class name referenced in s2 content (ThreadDeath and VirtualMachineError exception rows both mention that log output is handled by GlobalErrorHandler), but it is absent from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: ログ出力は :doc:`GlobalErrorHandler` で行われる。 (appears twice in the exception table for ThreadDeath and VirtualMachineError rows)

findings.description: `HttpResponse#getStatusCode` is a method reference used in step 2a of the outbound processing flow to determine the default page, but it is absent from s2 hints. The other two HttpResponse method references (`HttpResponse#setInputStream` and `HttpResponse#write`) are already included.
findings.source_evidence: `HttpResponse#getStatusCode()` の値に合致するデフォルトページへのコンテンツパスを設定してリターンする。
